intro: Bryodesma shakotanense, also known as Shakotan moss or Shakotan Bryodesma, is a type of lichenized liverwort that belongs to the family Lepidoziaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, with potential health benefits including the treatment of gastrointestinal issues, inflammation, and respiratory problems.
